series_metadata.series_title: Disapproved Land and Water Conservation Fund / Nature Works Grants
series_metadata.series_description: These are grant applications for the Federal Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF)and the State Nature Works program (NW) that were not approved for grant funding. Both the LWCF and the NW grants can be used to acquireand develop recreation land and facilities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from time grants were not approved, and
